message.content:
Use WebSearch to find companies hiring freshers/2026 graduates in India for Full-Stack Engineer, Backend Engineer, Software Engineer roles at 15+ LPA salary.

Search these queries:
1. "top indian startups hiring freshers 2026 software engineer 15 lpa"
2. "series b c startups india bangalore hiring freshers 2026 backend developer"  
3. "india unicorn soonicorn hiring fresh graduates 2026 engineer"
4. site:wellfound.com "software engineer" "india" "entry level" 2026
5. "best indian product companies for freshers 2025 2026 package 15 20 lpa"
6. "YC backed indian startups hiring 2026 engineers"
7. inc42.com OR yourstory.com "hiring freshers" "engineers" 2026 india

Compile 80-100 unique companies. Return ONLY a pipe-separated list like:
CompanyName | Role | Type(Startup/MNC)

DO NOT include: razorpay, phonepe, groww, zepto, swiggy, zomato, meesho, flipkart, amazon, google, microsoft, paytm, freshworks, chargebee, clevertap, darwinbox, healthifyme, pristyn care, tata 1mg, pharmeasy, kreditbee, browserstack, sprinklr, moengage, webengagr, exotel, devrev, rudderstack, hasura, posthog, lenskart, moneyview, navi technologies, hyperface, decentro, setu, juspay, cashfree, acko, go digit, ofbusiness, zetwerk, infra.market, plum, unacademy, byju's, physicswallah, scaler, great learning, sharechat, hike, games24x7, nazara, coinswitch, coindcx, cred, unicommerce, increff, pine labs, upstox, smallcase, vested finance, wint wealth, mudrex

content.text: I'll run all 7 searches in parallel to compile the company list efficiently.

input.query: top indian startups hiring freshers 2026 software engineer 15 lpa
series b c startups india bangalore hiring freshers 2026 backend developer engineer
india unicorn soonicorn hiring fresh graduates 2026 software engineer

Links: [{"title":"Startup Jobs in India (April 2026)","url":"https://startup.jobs/locations/india"},{"title":"15+ Best IT Companies for Freshers in 2026 (Highest Salary)","url":"https://payilagam.com/blogs/which-it-company-is-best-for-freshers/"},{"title":"Top 10 Highest Paying Jobs For Freshers in India (2026)","url":"https://jobipo.com/blog/top-10-highest-paying-jobs-for-freshers-in-india/"},{"title":"Top 10 Companies Hiring Freshers in India (2026)","url":"https://internshala.com/blog/list-of-companies-hiring-freshers-in-india/"},{"title":"Software Engineer Salary in India 2026: Complete Guide from Fresher to Senior Level","url":"https://thesalaryinfo.com/job-salary/software-engineer/"},{"title":"High Paying IT Jobs for Freshers in India 2026 — Real Salaries & Skill","url":"https://cambridgeinfotech.io/high-paying-it-jobs-for-freshers/"},{"title":"Companies Hiring Freshers in India 2025 | Complete Guide + Salary","url":"https://jobs.pitchnhire.com/resources/companies-hiring-freshers-in-india-2025"},{"title":"India Jobs - Tech & Startup Jobs | Wellfound","url":"https://wellfound.com/location/india"},{"title":"Startup Jobs in Bengaluru (May 2026)","url":"https://startup.jobs/locations/bengaluru"},{"title":"Top 73 India Startups — Newly Funded & Hiring","url":"https://topstartups.io/?hq_location=India"}]

Based on the search results, here's what I found about top Indian startups hiring freshers for software engineer roles with ₹15 LPA packages in 2026:

## Highest Paying Startups and Companies for Freshers (₹15+ LPA)

Product companies such as Google and Microsoft offer ₹15–25 LPA for freshers from the best institutes, and Google India, Microsoft India, Amazon India, and Adobe India pay ₹15–40 LPA+ to exceptional freshers from premier institutions.

Additionally, Flipkart, Razorpay, Zepto, CRED and Meesho have emerged as highly popular choices for freshers, promising packages between ₹12–20 LPA for stellar performers.

## Salary Context for Software Engineers

AI and Machine Learning Engineering currently offers the highest starting salaries for freshers in India — ranging from ₹15 LPA at mid-tier companies to ₹30–60 LPA+ at top product companies and research labs.

In 2026, Bengaluru continues to be India's tech capital. Bangalore commands a 15–20% salary premium over other cities, and it remains well ahead because of robust hiring by SaaS firms, product startups, and multinational tech companies.

## Key Takeaway

To secure ₹15+ LPA packages as a fresher software engineer, you should focus on:
- Global product companies and funded Indian startups pay the highest fresher salaries in India
- Companies in Bengaluru, Hyderabad, and other emerging tech hubs
- Roles in AI/ML, Full Stack Development, and Cloud Computing

Based on the search results, here's what I found about Series B/C startups in Bangalore hiring freshers for backend developer roles in 2026:

## Key Findings:

**Active Job Platforms:**
There are 1,278 startup jobs in Bangalore, with several platforms actively listing opportunities. Job openings at Bangalore tech startups can be found on platforms like LinkedIn, AngelList, and Glassdoor, or directly on the company's career page.

**Top Startups Hiring:**
The top tech startups in Bangalore include Twid, Zolve, Supertails, Jodo, Bimaplan, Codingal, and Kutumb, spanning diverse sectors like fintech, edtech, and social networking.

**Backend Developer Opportunities:**
The search results show backend engineering roles are available. Emergent (S24) has Backend Engineer positions listed. However, many of the visible backend roles appear to be senior/staff level positions rather than fresher entry-level roles.

**Fresher-Friendly Environment:**
For freshers seeking entry-level roles, these companies provide excellent starting points to build strong career foundations in various cutting-edge fields, with competitive salaries and a mix of hybrid or remote working models.

**Where to Apply:**
25+ startup companies are hiring freshers in Bangalore, with latest jobs in development, sales, marketing and customer support.

For the most current backend developer positions specifically for freshers, I recommend checking Wellfound, topstartups.io, and Glassdoor directly, as these platforms have dedicated filters for location, funding stage, and experience level.

Based on the search results, here's what I found about Indian unicorns and soonicorns hiring fresh graduates for software engineer roles in 2026:

## Soonicorn Landscape in India

The Indian startup ecosystem is currently home to 147 soonicorns – startups with a valuation in a range of $200 Mn to under $1 Bn. These soonicorns together boast a combined valuation of about $60 Bn and have netted over $18 Bn in funding to date. Some notable soonicorns that recently joined this category include Ultrahuman, Miko, Geniemode, Snitch, and Agnikul Cosmos.

## Hiring Activity

The average hiring rate for unicorn companies is estimated to be around 20% per annum, significantly higher than the industry average. More than half of all job postings by these unicorns are for fresh graduates.

## Fresh Graduate Salary Expectations

For software engineers entering the field in 2026, the average salary of fresher software engineers in India is ₹5 LPA with a range of ₹3–8 LPA. However, Flipkart, Razorpay, Zepto, CRED and Meesho are emerging as highly popular choices for freshers, with packages between ₹12–20 LPA for stellar performers.

The search results show that while there's significant hiring activity in India's unicorn and soonicorn ecosystem, I didn't find specific job listings or hiring announcements for soonicorns specifically targeting fresh graduates in 2026. For the latest job openings, you may want to check job boards like LinkedIn, AngelList, or company career pages directly.
